positive: A stylized, minimalist mountain range silhouette against a vibrant gradient sky. The mountains should feature diverse geometric shapes and overlapping layers, creating depth. The sky transitions smoothly from deep teal at the bottom to soft apricot and pale violet at the top. Include subtle elements of stylized flying creatures (like geometric birds or celestial manta rays) crossing the scene. The overall aesthetic should be clean, modern, and highly contrasting, suitable for a centered, repeat apparel print. Flat vector art style with high definition lines and bold solid colors.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, signature, low detail, photo, photorealistic, messy, gradients (except for the specified background gradient)
